'''Ogden Minor''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the savage [[terbeast]]s. It mainly consisted of a jungle-type terrain.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
